summary: Phase 5 NeoNoble Ramp feature testing completed. 24/24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification passed for all new features: Wallet & Banking page with 3 tabs (Wallet, On-Chain, Banking), physical card creation with shipping address, and Dashboard navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-chain wallet sync correctly connects to 3 chains (Ethereum, BSC, Polygon) via public RPCs
IBAN generation uses simulated 'NE' prefix - production would integrate real banking partner (NIUM/Modulr)
SEPA deposits are user-triggered (simulated) - production would use banking webhooks
Physical cards require shipping_address field - returns 400 if missing
Physical cards get tracking_number (NN-*), shipping_status, and estimated_delivery fields
Virtual cards are immediately active, physical cards start with pending_shipment status
Wallet conversion supports crypto↔fiat, crypto↔crypto, fiat↔crypto with 0.3% fee
Banking admin endpoint correctly requires ADMIN role (returns 403 for regular users)
seed_data_creation: Test wallet linked on BSC, EUR IBAN assigned, SEPA deposits/withdrawals created, physical and virtual cards created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully tested. Wallet page route is /wallet with 3 tabs (Wallet, On-Chain, Banking). Physical card creation requires shipping_address object. IBAN prefix is 'NE' (simulated). Multi-chain supports ethereum/bsc/polygon. BSC connected=true typically, ETH/Polygon may show connected=false depending on RPC availability.

mocked_apis.IBAN_generation: Simulated with NE prefix - not connected to real banking partner

multichain.GET /api/multichain/chains: PASS - Returns 3 chains (ethereum, bsc, polygon) with connection status
multichain.POST /api/multichain/link: PASS - Links wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD18 on BSC with balances

banking.POST /api/banking/sepa/deposit: PASS - Credits EUR wallet with EUR 500
banking.POST /api/banking/sepa/withdraw: PASS - Processes withdrawal with fee calculation
banking.GET /api/banking/admin/overview (admin): PASS - Returns IBAN and transaction stats

enhanced_cards.POST /api/cards/create (physical with sh: PASS - Creates card with pending_shipment status and tracking_number
enhanced_cards.POST /api/cards/create (virtual): PASS - Creates active virtual card without shipping
enhanced_cards.GET /api/cards/{card_id}/shipping: PASS - Returns shipping info for physical card

card_funding.POST /api/cards/{card_id}/top-up: PASS - Top-up with crypto conversion to EUR

wallet_conversion.GET /api/wallet/balances: PASS - Returns wallets with EUR values

frontend.wallet_tab_wallet: PASS - Shows balances (BTC, EUR, NENO, USDT, ETH) and settlements
frontend.wallet_tab_onchain: PASS - Shows 3 chain cards (Ethereum, BNB Smart Chain, Polygon)
frontend.wallet_tab_banking: PASS - Shows IBAN, BIC, bank name, deposits/withdrawals, transactions
frontend.physical_card_modal_shipping: PASS - Shipping address form appears for physical card type
frontend.physical_card_tracking: PASS - Cards show NN-* tracking number, shipping status, delivery estimate

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/multichain/link - Link wallet address on chain
POST /api/cards/create - Create virtual/physical card with shipping
GET /api/cards/{card_id}/shipping - Get physical card shipping status
POST /api/wallet/fund-card - Fund card from crypto wallet
